title: Zach Reini
body:
# Zach Reini

Denver visual artist and multi-band musician — performs in Civilized, Cinderblock, Data Rainbow, Cadaver Dog, and Ukko's Hammer. RedLine resident; 2012 graduate of Rocky Mountain College of Art + Design. Co-founded **Leisure**, a multidisciplinary art/music/DIY space at 555 Santa Fe Drive in Denver. Solo work spans grind/hardcore to ambient techno and dungeon synth.

## Connection to Colin

Track 21 of REMIX10: **"ZACH REINI-VEIL (D flat major mix)"** — Colin's "D flat major mix" of "Veil." Note the unusual mix-name format (a key signature, rather than Colin's usual absurdist coinage) — possibly tied to the source track's actual key.

The Leisure space connects with Colin's broader scene — Westword called it "a blank slate for live music" — and Reini's RedLine residency aligns with the post-2018 CRFW Fund's home at RedLine Contemporary Art Center.

## Note for `kind` field

This stub is filed as `org_kind: solo project` because Reini's REMIX10 contribution is under his own name, but he has multiple band projects that could each merit org stubs if they ever appear in Colin's orbit. If a `kind: person` move makes more sense at vault scale, this entry should be reconsidered.
